message:
test(oracle): add 10 conformance tests (s195-s204) for edges and JSON

Integer overflow, float formatting, IS/IS NOT TRUE/FALSE, BETWEEN/IN
with NULLs, INSERT...SELECT, COLLATE NOCASE, multiple aggregates,
column aliases in ORDER BY, JSON functions, rowid/oid/_rowid_ queries.
511 oracle pass, 0 fail, 1 ignored.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
